sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, details Nested(hobbies Array(String), skills Array(String))) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, details.hobbies, details.skills) VALUES (1, 'Alice', ['reading', 'traveling'], ['SQL', 'Python']);
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Alicia' WHERE id = 1;
